3227280.name: NEETNectar's Abysmally Small Assortment
3227280.description:
DESCRIPTION

NEETNectar's Abysmally Small Assortment is a collection of minimalistic games with a maximum of 3 inputs per game. All the games will be score based, and we may add new games as we think of them. The games currently available are:
  • Air Walk Ninja - An endless side scrolling platformer
  • Paddle Hero - A paddle style game where the ball is a weapon
  • Symbol Says - A casual memory based game
  • Clicker Boss - An idle type game with brutal conditions
  • Asteroids and Aliens - A simple shoot 'em up type game
  • Fist Bump - An endless side scrolling beat 'em up
